name: tokencodec
description: A local, lossless table codec for shrinking JSON/NDJSON in LLM prompts. Browser extension, web tool, CLI (encode/decode), and JS library.

scripts.test: node engine.test.mjs && node install.test.mjs && node middleware/compress.test.mjs && node middleware/http.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: node e2e/accuracy.node.test.mjs && node e2e/claims.test.mjs && node e2e/accuracy.browser.test.mjs && node e2e/cli.test.mjs && node e2e/realworld.test.mjs
